title: Senior Python Backend Engineer
description:
We are looking for a Senior Python Backend Engineer to join our growing engineering team. You will design and build scalable, high-performance REST APIs and microservices that power our SaaS platform.

Key Responsibilities:
- Design, develop, and maintain Python-based backend services using FastAPI or Django
- Build and optimise RESTful APIs and GraphQL endpoints
- Architect microservices with Docker and Kubernetes in a cloud environment (AWS or GCP)
- Implement CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions or Jenkins
- Work closely with frontend engineers, product managers, and data teams
- Mentor junior and mid-level engineers
- Participate in system design and architecture reviews
- Write clean, testable code with full unit and integration test coverage
- Manage PostgreSQL and Redis databases
- Implement security best practices including OAuth2, JWT, and data encryption

Required Skills:
- 5+ years of Python development experience
- Strong experience with FastAPI or Django REST Framework
- PostgreSQL database design and optimisation
- Docker and Kubernetes containerisation
- AWS or GCP cloud infrastructure
- CI/CD pipeline experience (GitHub Actions, Jenkins)
- Git version control and code review experience
- Microservices and distributed systems design
- REST API design principles
- Unit testing and TDD methodology

Nice to Have:
- Redis caching experience
- Celery task queues
- GraphQL API experience
- Terraform infrastructure as code
- Experience with Elasticsearch
- Open source contributions

Benefits:
- Competitive salary £90,000 - £120,000
- Remote-first culture with flexible hours
- 30 days annual leave
- Private health insurance
- £2,000 annual learning budget
- Latest MacBook Pro
- Team off-sites twice per year
